channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: US Will Bomb Bridges, Power Plants If Iran Shoots At Ships In Hormuz: Trump

media:content.media:description: A day earlier, Trump warned that the United States was "not finished" attacking Iran

item.description: Trump said that it does not matter if the attack is by a missile, rocket or drone; the United States will "bomb and destroy" a bridge or power plant near Iran's capital -- Tehran.
item.content:encoded: Trump said that it does not matter if the attack is by a missile, rocket or drone; the United States will "bomb and destroy" a bridge or power plant near Iran's capital -- Tehran.

item.title: Bulgaria Approves US Use Of Bezmer Air Base For Middle East Support

media:content.media:description: US military to use air base in Bulgaria to support US operations in the Middle East.

item.description: Up to eight US tanker aircraft and 250 personnel will be stationed at Bezmer Air Base from Friday to October without further approvals.
item.content:encoded: Up to eight US tanker aircraft and 250 personnel will be stationed at Bezmer Air Base from Friday to October without further approvals.

item.title: US-India Trade Deal Could Be Signed In 3-4 Months, US Official Says

media:content.media:description: The official said the agreement was nearly complete

item.description: Washington and New Delhi have been negotiating a bilateral trade agreement to expand market access and lower trade barriers as part of efforts to deepen economic ties.
item.content:encoded: Washington and New Delhi have been negotiating a bilateral trade agreement to expand market access and lower trade barriers as part of efforts to deepen economic ties.

item.title: US Plans To Announce Nuclear Agreement With Saudi Arabia Amid Iran Tensions

media:content.media:description: Trump administration said the agreement would provide billions of dollars for the US nuclear industry

item.description: The move comes as Washington fights a war with Iran that began in part over US concerns with Tehran's own nuclear program -- an issue that remains a key point of contention during now-stalled talks between the two foes.
item.content:encoded: The move comes as Washington fights a war with Iran that began in part over US concerns with Tehran's own nuclear program -- an issue that remains a key point of contention during now-stalled talks between the two foes.

item.title: Meta Lawsuit Shows That If AI Fires You, Proving It Is The Hard Part

media:content.media:description: A hearing is scheduled for August 24. (Representational)

item.description: Workers who claim to be targeted for layoffs because of disabilities or medical leave, often cannot muster the evidence of wrongdoing necessary to quickly secure a win in court.
item.content:encoded: Workers who claim to be targeted for layoffs because of disabilities or medical leave, often cannot muster the evidence of wrongdoing necessary to quickly secure a win in court.

item.title: 15 People Injured After Two Trams Collide On Rotterdam's Erasmus Bridge

media:content.media:description: The bridge has been closed to all traffic in both directions.

item.description: Bridge's webcam footage showed a tram steaming into the back of another, sending debris flying across the lanes of traffic and damaging both trams.
item.content:encoded: Bridge's webcam footage showed a tram steaming into the back of another, sending debris flying across the lanes of traffic and damaging both trams.

item.title: Who Is Mykhailo Drapaty? All About Ukraine's New Army Chief

media:content.media:description: Drapaty's nomination hailed by many inside and outside the army, reports say.

item.description: The 43-year-old Drapaty replaces Oleksandr Syrsky, 60, an accomplished military strategist who was long criticised for Soviet-style practices and not caring about human losses.
item.content:encoded: The 43-year-old Drapaty replaces Oleksandr Syrsky, 60, an accomplished military strategist who was long criticised for Soviet-style practices and not caring about human losses.

item.title: Iran-US War News Live Updates: Israel-Lebanon Talks To Be Held In Italy On August 4

media:content.media:description: Shipping through the Strait of Hormuz has largely stalled

item.description: US-Iran War News Live Updates: The US State Department has issued an alert urging American citizens around the world to "exercise increased caution" over the war with Iran. The alert said that "due to heightened tensions in the Middle East.
item.content:encoded: US-Iran War News Live Updates: The US State Department has issued an alert urging American citizens around the world to "exercise increased caution" over the war with Iran. The alert said that "due to heightened tensions in the Middle East.

item.title: Ebola Outbreak In Congo Reaches Nearly 1000 Deaths

media:content.media:description: Ebola is rare, but highly contagious and can be contracted via bodily fluids

item.description: As of Sunday, 2,473 cases have been recorded in the latest outbreak and 999 people have died, says latest update from Congo's Ministry of Health.
item.content:encoded: As of Sunday, 2,473 cases have been recorded in the latest outbreak and 999 people have died, says latest update from Congo's Ministry of Health.

item.title: AI Firm Anthropic Donates $20 Million To Support AI Regulation Lobbying

media:content.media:description: Anthropic is donating to Public First Action, a political group that advocates for "mitigating AI risks."

item.description: The donation is an attempt by the AI sector to increase its influence over US policy, as the federal government considers more oversight of the sector.
item.content:encoded: The donation is an attempt by the AI sector to increase its influence over US policy, as the federal government considers more oversight of the sector.

item.title: Pan Am Plane Wreckage Found 74 Years After Crash That Killed 52 People

media:content.media:description: The plane was found nearly 2,000 feet below the surface.

item.description: Only 12 passengers and all five crew members were rescued by the US Coast Guard and Air Force. The other 52 people drowned.
item.content:encoded: Only 12 passengers and all five crew members were rescued by the US Coast Guard and Air Force. The other 52 people drowned.

item.title: Louvre Apollo Gallery Reopens After $102 Million Crown Jewels Theft

media:content.media:description: The jewels stolen in a daytime heist remain unrecovered nine months later.

item.description: The public can tour the majestic room and view its gilded ceilings and Greek frescoes en route to the nearby Mona Lisa, but they won't see any crown jewels or empty display cases.
item.content:encoded: The public can tour the majestic room and view its gilded ceilings and Greek frescoes en route to the nearby Mona Lisa, but they won't see any crown jewels or empty display cases.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | A Snub, A Cancelled Visit: Why Trump Doesn't Even Want To See Netanyahu Anymore
item.description: Trump is now so annoyed with Netanyahu that he doesn't even want to meet him. What happened?
item.content:encoded: Trump is now so annoyed with Netanyahu that he doesn't even want to meet him. What happened?

item.title: OpenAI Says AI Models Went Rogue Triggering Unusual Breach During Testing

media:content.media:description: Hugging Face is a platform used to host open-source large language models. (Representational)

item.description: OpenAI's advanced models escaped containment, reach the internet, and break into Hugging Face while being tested in a controlled environment.
item.content:encoded: OpenAI's advanced models escaped containment, reach the internet, and break into Hugging Face while being tested in a controlled environment.

item.title: French Modelling Scout Linked To Epstein Found Dead At Home Near Paris

media:content.media:description: Siad's name appeared in more than 1,000 documents released as part of Epstein files

item.description: Under investigation in France, Daniel Siad, 69, was one of several French men accused of aiding Epstein to traffic and abuse women.
item.content:encoded: Under investigation in France, Daniel Siad, 69, was one of several French men accused of aiding Epstein to traffic and abuse women.

item.title: Hitler's Birth House Converted To Police Station To Deter Neo-Nazi Pilgrimage

media:content.media:description: Hitler's birthplace begins new life as a police station

item.description: "The aim was to prevent any association with Adolf Hitler, so as to strip it of that mystique," the head of the Austrian interior ministry's history department, Stephan Mlczoch, told reporters on a tour of the building.
item.content:encoded: "The aim was to prevent any association with Adolf Hitler, so as to strip it of that mystique," the head of the Austrian interior ministry's history department, Stephan Mlczoch, told reporters on a tour of the building.

item.title: Pakistan Seeks $10 Billion Favour From US After Playing Iran War Mediator

media:content.media:description: The lifeline could provide a lifeline for the cash-strapped South Asian economy

item.description: If approved, the facility could bolster Pakistan's reserves, ease pressure on the rupee, and reduce its reliance on multilateral financing, even as Islamabad undertakes tighter fiscal and monetary policies in line with its International Monetary Fund program.
item.content:encoded: If approved, the facility could bolster Pakistan's reserves, ease pressure on the rupee, and reduce its reliance on multilateral financing, even as Islamabad undertakes tighter fiscal and monetary policies in line with its International Monetary Fund program.

item.title: Mamdani Realises He Can't Legally Arrest Netanyahu, Urges US To Enforce Warrant

media:content.media:description: Mamdani believes ICC warrant is justified and said Netanyahu "is not welcome in New York City."

item.description: The New York City mayor said that the city lacks the authority to enforce the International Criminal Court's arrest warrant against the Israeli prime minister.
item.content:encoded: The New York City mayor said that the city lacks the authority to enforce the International Criminal Court's arrest warrant against the Israeli prime minister.

item.title: 'He Didn't Stop While Convicted': Epstein Survivor Recalls Years Of Abuse

media:content.media:description: The model revealed that she was molested and raped every weekend in West Palm Beach

item.description: At the centre of Roza Gilles story is Jeffrey Epstein's 2008 plea deal in Florida for charges including soliciting a minor for prostitution.
item.content:encoded: At the centre of Roza Gilles story is Jeffrey Epstein's 2008 plea deal in Florida for charges including soliciting a minor for prostitution.

item.title: Trump Threatens To Bomb Iran's Pickaxe Nuke Site Soon. But Can US Destroy It?

media:content.media:description: Pickaxe Mountain is located 220 km (140 miles) south of Tehran

item.description: The warning came even as it remains unclear just what has been placed at Pickaxe Mountain, as the United Nations' nuclear watchdog has never gained access to the site.
item.content:encoded: The warning came even as it remains unclear just what has been placed at Pickaxe Mountain, as the United Nations' nuclear watchdog has never gained access to the site.
